education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science

experience.title: Energy Analyst
responsibilities: Conducted energy modeling to assess the impact of various efficiency measures.
Analyzed energy data to identify trends and develop actionable insights for clients.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver comprehensive energy efficiency reports.
Utilized Excel and SQL for data manipulation and visualization.
Supported the development of renewable energy systems through data-driven recommendations.

experience.title: Junior Energy Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in data analysis and report generation for energy sustainability projects.
Conducted statistical analysis to evaluate project performance and efficiency.
Participated in workshops focused on renewable energy solutions and energy efficiency strategies.

response.summary: Detail-oriented Energy Analyst with over 4 years of experience in energy modeling, data analysis, and sustainability projects. Proven track record in improving energy efficiency and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful insights.
